description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7 Docker image with redis:latest and postgres:latest services. Define a Test job in the default test stage that runs before_script commands: python -V, pip install -U pipenv, pipenv install --system --deploy, then executes pytest as its script. Set a DATABASE_URL variable pointing to postgresql://postgres:secret@postgres:5432/$POSTGRES_DB and define POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables for the Postgres service. Enable a pip cache at ~/.cache/pip/. Add a coverage pattern /\d+\.\d+%$/ to capture test coverage. The pipeline has no explicit artifacts or rules.
